title: RFE Submission Metadata
description: The submission.json manifest inside an RFE upload. A consumer submits a corpus arguing that a pruned feature is needed in their domain; the telemetry re-run (Task 5.2) evaluates it.

grammar.description: Which standard the corpus targets, e.g. 'rfc3986-uri' or 'rfc5280-x509'.

rationale.description: Why the pruned feature matters in the submitter's domain.
